narrative:
Highland Heights-03-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 817 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.8 percentage points.
